summary: Implemented deterministic middle-strength local AI heuristics in src/ai/heuristicAi.ts so chooseAiAction remains legal-action-only while using bidding strength, ordered-contract floor/context, deterministic discard scoring, whist/check profile handling, play-mode/trump/trick context, continuation phases, and richer no-legal-actions diagnostics. Added focused US-843 unit coverage in src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts for legality across AI-controlled phases, non-first bidding behavior, legal contract ordering, exact-two-card legal discard, ten-level check, six-spades legal whist choice, play-mode-sensitive card selection, continuation actions, and diagnostic error context. Final targeted AI regression and full npm run verify both passed.

tests_run.evidence: Initial red run failed bidding fallback, contract-play context, and no-legal-actions diagnostic assertions; green run passed 9 heuristic AI tests.
11 tests passed, covering phase-aware AI heuristics plus deterministic harness auto-advance loop regression.
Vitest: 11 files, 109 tests passed. Build: tsc and vite build completed successfully.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI chooser only returns actions from getLegalActions across bidding, contract/order, widow pickup, discard, whist decision, all-pass play, misere play, contract play, settlement, and next-deal states.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts legality matrix; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Coverage is representative across AI-controlled phases rather than an exhaustive bullet-completion matrix in this task.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI chooser uses hand strength, contract floor, trump, trick, whist profile, all-pass, and misere context instead of a phase-blind fallback.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts bidding/order/discard/whist/play heuristics; focused assertions in src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Heuristics are intentionally simple and deterministic, not search-based or intended to replicate the original DOS AI exactly.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given legal actions exist, AI selects one of them without throwing.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: Representative legal-action property checks in src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: Assertion coverage is automated local Vitest coverage; no external runtime or browser-network path applies in this project scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Across bidding, whist, contract play, all-pass, and misere scenarios, AI decisions are phase-aware and not always the first legal action.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: Bidding and play-mode tests assert non-first-action choices where context warrants; whist and continuation tests assert phase-specific behavior.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Phase-awareness is validated through representative scenarios rather than every possible legal-action ordering permutation.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts; npm run verify
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Regression evidence is local deterministic test/build coverage and does not include a separate manual browser smoke run for this task.
Observability coverage here is limited to thrown diagnostic context for no-legal-actions states; no telemetry or external logging path exists in scope.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; local deterministic AI logic only
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: This task does not introduce network, auth, persistence-boundary, or sensitive-data behavior beyond existing local app scope.
This row contributes implementation evidence for the orchestrator release decision; broader epic readiness still depends on adjacent task coverage.
